name: apogee
description: Claude Code workflow machinery: lifecycle hooks (br/git-flow/idea/review gates), workflow skills (update-docs, review-work, second-opinion, deploy, doc, readme, image-gen/edit, bg-remove, br, git-commit, git-flow, idea-mcp), and the init/prime/plan-feature/release/merge/run-plan commands. Install once, enable per project.
